title: cytisus albus f. pallidus
intro: Cytisus albus f. pallidus, also known as pale broom or white broom, is a plant species that belongs to the Fabaceae family and is native to Europe. The plant contains isoflavones, particularly genistein and daidzein, which possess medicinal properties, particularly in treating menopausal symptoms and cardiovascular diseases. The health benefits of Cytisus albus f. pallidus include its ability to act as an antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and estrogenic agent, which can help alleviate hot flashes, night sweats, and osteoporosis. The plant is traditionally used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
